dialogueChunks.intro: Our patrols have been ambushed repeatedly, {player_name}. The {enemy_type_plural} knew exactly where our people would be and when. Someone is feeding them information.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} reviewed the plans and confirmed they were shared only with trusted members. The leak has to come from within. {quest_focus_The} was found in the wreckage near {location_hint}, written in our own cipher.
dialogueChunks.outro: We have a traitor among us. I need someone outside the usual chain of trust to investigate before {quest_threat_the} gets more of our people killed.

dialogueChunks.intro: Someone has been issuing orders in our leader's name, {player_name}: orders that divert supplies, reassign guards, and leave key positions unmanned. The forgeries are skillful.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} intercepted {quest_focus_the} before it could be carried out and recognized the deception. The orders would have left the gate near {location_hint} unguarded while the {enemy_type_plural} are at their most aggressive. This is not carelessness: it is deliberate sabotage.
dialogueChunks.outro: Whoever is behind {quest_threat_the} has connections and patience. Will you help us trace the source before {quest_time_pressure}?

dialogueChunks.intro: {quest_ally} saw something unsettling last night, {player_name}: one of our own meeting with {enemy_type_plural} scouts outside the walls. Not fighting. Talking.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: It happened near {location_hint}, well away from the usual patrol routes. {quest_focus_The} suggests this was not the first meeting either. Someone in our settlement has been negotiating with {quest_threat_the} behind everyone's backs.
dialogueChunks.outro: We need proof before we can act. Investigate the meeting site and find out what terms were being discussed. {quest_stakes_The} may depend on it.
